    • getAbstractEventInfo

      public AbstractEventInfo getAbstractEventInfo(String label) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IAbstractEventTable
      Returns the abstract event info for the specified label, or null if this table does not contain an abstract event info for that label.
      Specified by:
      getAbstractEventInfo in interface IAbstractEventTable
      Parameters:
      label - the label of the abstract event info sought
      Returns:
      the abstract event info for the specified label, or null if this table does not contain an abstract event info for that label
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if state is not immutable
